records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. There's no way a corpse could just get up and start moving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. There's no way a corpse could just get up and start moving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. There's no way a corpse could just get up and start moving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't expect the Wedge to be this close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't expect the Wedge to be this close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't expect the Wedge to be this close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehehe... Time to pocket some Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehehe... Time to pocket some Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehehe... Time to pocket some Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, ah. Can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, ah. Can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, ah. Can you hear me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eeeek!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eeeek!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eeeek!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you taken care of the evil spirits?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you taken care of the evil spirits?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you taken care of the evil spirits?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Waiting around was getting frustrating, so I decided to check in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Waiting around was getting frustrating, so I decided to check in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Waiting around was getting frustrating, so I decided to check in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You made me lose an evil spirit I almost had!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You made me lose an evil spirit I almost had!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You made me lose an evil spirit I almost had!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your rash decision nearly got me killed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your rash decision nearly got me killed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your rash decision nearly got me killed!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exorcisms require absolute focus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exorcisms require absolute focus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exorcisms require absolute focus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to you, I just got jinxed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to you, I just got jinxed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to you, I just got jinxed!

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-my apologies. I didn't realize it was such a dangerous task...
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-my apologies. I didn't realize it was such a dangerous task...
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-my apologies. I didn't realize it was such a dangerous task...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, what an awful day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, what an awful day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, what an awful day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because of you, I now have extra work to clean up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because of you, I now have extra work to clean up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because of you, I now have extra work to clean up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From now on, do not contact me until I reach out first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From now on, do not contact me until I reach out first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From now on, do not contact me until I reach out first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-can I ask one thing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-can I ask one thing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-can I ask one thing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did the evil spirits appear in the first place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did the evil spirits appear in the first place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did the evil spirits appear in the first place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm, I'll need to investigate to be sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm, I'll need to investigate to be sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, I'll need to investigate to be sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But cemeteries are naturally filled with negative energy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But cemeteries are naturally filled with negative energy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But cemeteries are naturally filled with negative energy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you kept doing things that attract evil spirits, so... tsk, tsk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you kept doing things that attract evil spirits, so... tsk, tsk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you kept doing things that attract evil spirits, so... tsk, tsk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was just maintaining the cemetery as usual...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was just maintaining the cemetery as usual...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was just maintaining the cemetery as usual...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* It's fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* It's fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* It's fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Luckily for you, I know exactly how to handle cemetery upkeep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Luckily for you, I know exactly how to handle cemetery upkeep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Luckily for you, I know exactly how to handle cemetery upkeep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you contact the monastery, they'll give you details on our lecture fees.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you contact the monastery, they'll give you details on our lecture fees.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you contact the monastery, they'll give you details on our lecture fees.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can discuss it after I'm done with this exorcism.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can discuss it after I'm done with this exorcism.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can discuss it after I'm done with this exorcism.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...All right. I'll have my secretary reach out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right. I'll have my secretary reach out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right. I'll have my secretary reach out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll do my best to ensure your ancestors can rest in peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll do my best to ensure your ancestors can rest in peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll do my best to ensure your ancestors can rest in peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, were they buried with any jewelry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, were they buried with any jewelry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, were they buried with any jewelry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were, but... why do you ask?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They were, but... why do you ask?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They were, but... why do you ask?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some evil spirits are drawn to wealth. I'll need to remove any tempting items.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some evil spirits are drawn to wealth. I'll need to remove any tempting items.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some evil spirits are drawn to wealth. I'll need to remove any tempting items.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Do as you must.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Do as you must.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Do as you must.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yesss! Thank you very much!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yesss! Thank you very much!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yesss! Thank you very much!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect. Got myself a prime jackpot!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect. Got myself a prime jackpot!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect. Got myself a prime jackpot!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dear ancestors of my client, I'm so sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dear ancestors of my client, I'm so sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dear ancestors of my client, I'm so sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I have to make a living too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I have to make a living too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I have to make a living too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nothing personal, so just quietly hand over your expensive treasures.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nothing personal, so just quietly hand over your expensive treasures.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nothing personal, so just quietly hand over your expensive treasures.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Another C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Another C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Another C.O.?
